message:
refactor(tests): feature-gate test-internals, centralize test utilities, modernize APIs

Systematic cleanup across 45+ test and benchmark files:

Feature gating:
- Add #![cfg(feature = "test-internals")] to all benchmark files and
  many integration tests that depend on internal testing infrastructure,
  preventing accidental test code leakage into production builds

Test utility centralization:
- Migrate from asupersync::test_utils::init_test_logging() to
  common::init_test_logging() via shared tests/common/mod.rs module
- Add mod asupersync re-export shim in several test files to allow
  test_complete! and test_phase! macros to resolve via common module

API modernization:
- Replace verbose Cx::new(RegionId::from_arena(...), TaskId::from_arena(...),
  Budget::INFINITE) with Cx::for_testing() helper throughout
- Replace .arena_index().index() chains with TaskId::new_for_test()
- Replace RegionId::from_arena(ArenaIndex::new(...)) with
  RegionId::testing_default()

Style:
- Add #![allow(missing_docs)] to test files that trigger the lint
- Remove unused imports (io_cancellation.rs, repro_spawn_panic.rs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
